text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In dem Brandmüllerischen Buchladen wird ein <BIBL><TITLE>Project von <AUTHOR>Hiorini</AUTHOR> klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch avelichem Land-Leben</TITLE>, welches durch Subscriptionen in <VOLUME>2. Folianten</VOLUME> † <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neu fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, <BIBL>des Herrn Abbts <AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem franzosischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1. Removed premature </TITLE> tag in the first BIBL entry to correctly encompass the full title and author description. 2. Added missing <BIBL> opening tag for the Fleury entry. 3. Added missing </BIBL> closing tag for the Fleury entry. 4. Corrected encoding artifacts (e.g., \\u221a sequences) to proper German characters (ü, ß, ö) and fixed spacing in 'Subscriptionen'."}

Added missing <BIBL> opening tag for the Fleury entry. 3. Added missing </BIBL> closing tag for the Fleury entry. 4. Corrected encoding artifacts (e.g., \u221a sequences) to proper German characters (ü, ß, ö) and fixed spacing in 'Subscriptionen'.
